title: PokeMight! [Cobblemon]
description: A brand new unique experience, truly combining the worlds of minecraft and pokemon.
body:
Make sure you go to your instance options and increase your RAM before launching!

- 4GB RAM Minimum, but we recommend 6GB for optimal performance.
![divider](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fi.ibb.co%2FrF0wK96%2Fdivider.png&n=-1) ![PokeMight Logo](https://pokemight.com/img/logo/logo.webp) ![divider](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fi.ibb.co%2FrF0wK96%2Fdivider.png&n=-1)
PokeMight! Modpack

_A modpack adding various mods for cobblemon, and specifically the cobblemon server PokeMight! Adds various QOL, customisation and gameplay improvements. It is intended to increase the playability and optimisation while playing on our cobblemon server._ ![divider](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fi.ibb.co%2FrF0wK96%2Fdivider.png&n=-1)
QoL/Additions - AdvancementInfo - AppleSkin - Balm - Better F3 - Better Ping Display - Better Third Person - Bushier Flowers - Capes - Carpeted - CIT Resewn - Cobbledex - Cobbled Shiny Particles - Cobblemon - Cobblemon Integrations - Cobblemon Riding - Cobblemon Held Items - Cobblemon Unimplemented Items - Crafting Tweaks - Diagonal Fences - Drippy Loading Screen - Dynamic FPS - Easy NPC - Elytra Trims - Fancy Menu - Fight or Flight - Gravelmon - Gravels Extended Battles - Gym Badges - Handcrafted - Immersive Paintings - Just Enough Items - Legendary Tooltips - Litematica - Lootr - Macaws Decorative Mods - More Cobblemon Tweaks - More Slabs and Stairs - No Chat Reports - Overflowing Bars - PokeBlocks - ReachAround - SimpleRPC - SimpleTM's - 3D Skin Layers - Terrablender - WTHIT - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's World Map - YOSBR
Performance Mods - Bad Packets - Borderless Mining - Entity Culling - Indium - Iris - Memory Leak Fix - Nvidium - Packet Fixer - Sodium -
